story.soThat: API response schemas are consistent and automatically documented
story.tasks: - Task 1: Create swagger module directory structure (src/common/swagger/, src/common/swagger/__tests__/) - Task 2: Implement generic response class factory (createApiResponseClass) - Task 3: Implement paginated response class factory (createPaginatedApiResponseClass) - Task 4: Create error response class (ErrorApiResponseClass) - Task 5: Create barrel export file (src/common/swagger/index.ts) - Task 6: Write unit tests (12 comprehensive tests, 100% coverage target) - Task 7: Validate TypeScript compilation (npm run build) - Task 8: Integration validation (test with sample DTO, verify Swagger docs)

story-context.acceptanceCriteria:
AC-8.2.1: Generic response class factory function created - Function: createApiResponseClass(DataDto: Type) - Location: src/common/swagger/api-response.factory.ts - Returns runtime-generated response class with type metadata - Structure: { success: boolean, status: number, data: T, message: string } - Dynamic class name: ${DataDto.name}Response
AC-8.2.2: Paginated response class factory function created - Function: createPaginatedApiResponseClass(DataDto: Type) - Structure: { success: boolean, status: number, data: T[], count: number, message: string } - Dynamic class name: ${DataDto.name}PaginatedResponse
AC-8.2.3: Error response class created - Class: ErrorApiResponseClass - Properties: success (false), status (400), message (string), errors?: string[]
AC-8.2.4: Factory functions use correct decorators - All properties have @ApiProperty() decorators with examples - Type metadata set for DTO fields
AC-8.2.5: Response classes match interceptor format - Compatible with auto-wrapped response format - Success: { success, status, data, message } - Paginated: { success, status, data, count, message }
AC-8.2.6: Exports organized in barrel file - Create src/common/swagger/index.ts - Export all factory functions and classes
AC-8.2.7: Unit tests for factory functions - File: src/common/swagger/__tests__/api-response.factory.spec.ts - 12 comprehensive tests with 100% coverage
AC-8.2.8: TypeScript type safety validated - Generic type constraints correct - No compilation errors

doc.title: Epic Technical Specification: API Documentation (Swagger)
doc.section: Detailed Design - Data Models and Contracts
doc.snippet: Defines complete factory function architecture including createApiResponseClass(), createPaginatedApiResponseClass(), and ErrorApiResponseClass. Specifies exact implementation pattern with Object.defineProperty() for dynamic class naming and @ApiProperty() decorator requirements. Contains full code examples for implementation.

doc.title: Epic 8: API Documentation (Swagger)
doc.snippet: High-level story definition specifying that src/common/swagger/api-response.factory.ts must be created with factory functions for response wrapper classes. Documents the response format pattern (success, status, data, message) with paginated variant adding count property.

doc.title: Story 8.2 Detailed Specification
doc.section: Complete story with 8 Acceptance Criteria and 8 Task Blocks
doc.snippet: Authoritative acceptance criteria defining factory functions, response structure, decorators, barrel exports, unit tests (100% coverage), and TypeScript type safety validation. Includes Dev Notes with architecture patterns, learnings from Story 8.1, and comprehensive unit test examples.

doc.title: API Contracts Architecture
doc.snippet: Defines standard response wrapper format that factory functions must implement: Success response with { success, status, data, count?, message } and Error response with { success, status, message, errors? }. Critical for alignment between factory classes and actual interceptor implementation.

doc.title: Implementation Patterns (AI Agent Consistency Rules)
doc.section: API Response Format and Controller Pattern
doc.snippet: Shows auto-wrapped response interceptor pattern where controllers return plain DTOs, interceptor wraps in response envelope. Demonstrates controller usage of createApiResponseClass(UserResDto) in decorator pattern.

doc.title: Testing Strategy
doc.snippet: Establishes testing pattern with Arrange-Act-Assert structure, mocking strategy, and coverage requirements (100% for utility functions). Provides template for unit test organization applicable to factory function testing.

artifact.reason: Shows Swagger/OpenAPI setup using DocumentBuilder and SwaggerModule with Bearer JWT authentication. Demonstrates environment-based control (SWAGGER_ENABLED) and error handling pattern. This is where factory-generated response classes will be used in decorators (Story 8.3).
Established pattern for Swagger decorators using applyDecorators and ApiOkResponse. Reference for decorator structure, though uses different pagination structure (items/metadata vs. data/count).
Shows export pattern for common decorators. Story 8.2 will create similar barrel export at src/common/swagger/index.ts.

CRITICAL: Global interceptor that AUTO-WRAPS responses. Response factory classes MUST match the structure this interceptor produces: { success, status, data, message }. This ensures Swagger docs reflect actual API responses.

Current controller structure returning { success, status, data } objects. Story 8.2 factory functions will enable Swagger documentation of these response types. Controllers don't yet have Swagger decorators (Story 8.3).

Testing pattern for Swagger configuration. Shows how to initialize app with Swagger enabled/disabled, validate OpenAPI document structure. Template for integration testing of factory-generated classes.

npm.package: Core Swagger/OpenAPI integration, provides @ApiProperty decorators and SwaggerModule
Provides Type helper for generic type handling and applyDecorators
DTO transformation utilities (optional for factory functions)

story-context.constraints: - Response format MUST match logging interceptor structure: { success, status, data, message } for single, { success, status, data, count, message } for paginated - Factory functions MUST use Type from @nestjs/common for generic type parameters - Dynamic class naming MUST use Object.defineProperty(class, 'name', { value: '...' }) - All class properties MUST have @ApiProperty() decorators with example values - Type metadata for DTO fields MUST use @ApiProperty({ type: DataDto }) for single, @ApiProperty({ type: [DataDto] }) for array - File location MUST be src/common/swagger/ following project structure conventions - Barrel export MUST be at src/common/swagger/index.ts - Unit tests MUST be in src/common/swagger/__tests__/ directory (not .spec.ts beside files) - Testing coverage target is 100% for utility/factory functions - NO runtime dependencies beyond @nestjs/swagger and @nestjs/common (both already installed) - Factory functions are PURE utilities - no dependency injection, no module imports

interface.name: createApiResponseClass(DataDto: Type): Type<ApiResponse>
createPaginatedApiResponseClass(DataDto: Type): Type<PaginatedApiResponse>
ErrorApiResponseClass

tests.standards: Unit tests follow Arrange-Act-Assert pattern with 100% coverage target for utility functions. Use Jest testing framework with @nestjs/testing utilities. Tests located in __tests__/ subdirectories (not .spec.ts beside source files). Mocking not required for pure factory functions. Test file: src/common/swagger/__tests__/api-response.factory.spec.ts with 12 comprehensive tests covering all factory functions, dynamic naming, type metadata, and error response structure.
tests.ideas: AC-8.2.1: Test createApiResponseClass() returns class constructor with correct structure (4 properties: success, status, data, message) AC-8.2.1: Test dynamic class naming matches ${DTO.name}Response pattern AC-8.2.1: Test data property preserves DTO type metadata AC-8.2.2: Test createPaginatedApiResponseClass() returns paginated class with count property (5 properties total) AC-8.2.2: Test paginated data property is array type AC-8.2.2: Test dynamic class naming matches ${DTO.name}PaginatedResponse pattern AC-8.2.3: Test ErrorApiResponseClass has all required properties (success, status, message, errors) AC-8.2.3: Test errors field is marked as optional (required: false) AC-8.2.4: Test @ApiProperty decorators applied to all properties AC-8.2.4: Test example values present for primitive fields AC-8.2.7: Test factory functions work with multiple DTO types (UserDto, FileDto, RoleDto) AC-8.2.8: Test TypeScript type safety (compilation validation)
